title: SOL 4pk Tin Foil 32m in Total - 8m x 29cm Large Size - Non-Stick Tin Foil for Wrapping, Grilling, BBQ & Baking – Heavy-Duty Silver Cooking Foil with Cutter
features: Locks In Flavours - Enjoy grilling, baking, roasting and wrapping delicious food using this tinfoil roll. Perfectly locks in and infuses the flavour of marinated food with this versatile aluminium foil. Cook your tender & juicy meals hassle-free.

Keep your Leftovers Fresh - Our tin foil roll can seal in moisture of food leftovers until the next day. Kitchen Foil Roll protects leftovers from freezer burn. Quickly and easily wrap up food to store in the refrigerator using the silver foil roll.

Handy Helper in the Kitchen - Wrap up sandwiches and other to-go meals using this foil roll to prevent messy splatters. Silver Foil is easy to clean by wiping it with a dampened cloth to look brand new. Line pans before cooking for easy clean-up.

Make Packets for the Grill - Use aluminium foil roll packets for delicious, easy meals on the grill to seal in moisture and flavour. Our tin foil prevents food from falling through the grates while grilling. Sit & wait for the juicy perfection.

8 meters x 29 cm of Silver Foil Kitchen Cooking Foil - This package contains four tinfoil roll. 32m cooking foil could last a good while. You will not run out of kitchen foil. Right thickness of foil kitchen for a weekend dinner party at home.

Yes, our aluminium foil is perfect for grilling, baking, and wrapping, locking in and infusing flavours into marinated food for tender and juicy meals. Is this foil suitable for storing leftovers? Absolutely! It seals in moisture, keeping food leftovers fresh and protected from freezer burn, making it easy to store food in the fridge. How does this foil assist in kitchen cleanliness? It's a handy helper for lining pans before cooking, wrapping up sandwiches, and preventing messy splatters, simplifying clean-up efforts. Can I use the foil for grilling? Definitely! Create aluminium foil packets for the grill to seal in moisture and flavour, preventing food from falling through the grates. How long will one pack of this foil last? With four rolls totalling 32 metres of foil, it offers ample coverage for kitchen use, lasting well through several weeks of cooking and wrapping tasks.
